stocks.impact_theory: Intel reported Q1 earnings beat with robust server CPU demand driven by AI, upbeat Q2 guidance including pricing increases. Economic implications: Signals ongoing chip shortage, boosting semis sector. Market psychology: Reversal from years of doubt to FOMO buying. Historical parallels: Similar to 2020 semis boom post-COVID. Analogies: Like a dam breaking after prolonged drought (supply constraints), or phoenix rising from ashes of foundry struggles.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings surprise +25% surge already, X sentiment highly positive (viral posts, upgrades expected), web news confirms sector lift. Continued AI demand sustains momentum.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for +15% gains on continued semis rally, target $95.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid short, high short squeeze risk post-surge.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Profit taking after massive move, broader market pullback from low consumer sentiment.

stocks.justification: Overwhelming positive news and X buzz, earnings validated turnaround.

stocks.impact_theory: Sympathy rally from INTC earnings highlighting CPU demand cycle. Implications: Broader semi recovery. Psychology: Validates AI beyond GPUs. Parallels: 2023 AI hype spillover. Analogies: Rising tide lifting all boats in chip harbor; domino effect from Intel's win.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Up 10%+ premarket, X posts bullish on semis S-curve, news ties to INTC CPU boom.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Overreliance on INTC halo, high valuation.

stocks.justification: Strong sympathy but no direct catalyst.

stocks.impact_theory: Q3 earnings beat with 7% sales growth from tax refunds. Implications: Resilient consumer staples amid low sentiment. Psychology: Safe haven appeal. Parallels: Post-2008 defensives strength. Analogies: Rock in stormy economy; steady ship in volatility.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Beat estimates, premarket +4%, positive X mentions, counters low consumer sentiment.

stocks.impact_theory: Riding semis wave from INTC, AI chip design demand. Implications: Ecosystem growth. Psychology: Momentum trader favorite. Parallels: NVDA 2023. Analogies: Conductor in AI orchestra; spark igniting fire.
